name: LERP
description: ERP de portfolio inspirado em arquitetura SAP, com Angular, NestJS e base pronta para PostgreSQL.

scripts.backend:clean: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/stop-dev-ports.ps1 && npm run start:dev --prefix backend
scripts.frontend:clean: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/stop-dev-ports.ps1 && npm run start --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
